name: Super Salmon Burgers
recipeIngredient: 12 1/2 ozs pink salmon, canned, boneless, skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and reserve 2 tablespoons of the liquid (or use 2 tablespoons water if using fresh cooked salmon).
2. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together the reserved liquid, egg, bread crumbs, cheese, onion, and thyme.
3. Add the drained salmon to the mixture and mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Shape the mixture into four patties that are about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Cook the patties for 2-3 minutes on each side or until they are browned on the outside.
7. Carefully flip the patties and cook for an additional 2 minutes on the remaining side.
8. Serve each patty in a lettuce and tomato-lined pita half, topped with tartar sauce or cocktail sauce.
